generated_exposure.exposure_text: As someone who values order and duty, you know how important it is to be prepared. The recent cuts to civil defense budgets are putting our communities at risk. Don't let short-sighted politicians gamble with our safety - demand better preparedness now. #NationalSecurity #CivilDefense
